title: Dubrueilia verbascifolia
intro:

Dubrueilia verbascifolia, also known as Verbascum thapsus, is a biennial herbaceous plant in the Scrophulariaceae family, commonly known as mullein. 

The health benefits of mullein include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. 

Mullein contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. 

The most common herbal preparations made with mullein include teas, infusions, and topical creams, often used to soothe skin irritations and coughs.
